hiring_local.headline: Why {{city}} homeowners vet contractors carefully
hiring_local.body: After major weather in {{county}}, out-of-area crews can appear overnight. Prioritize {{city}}-based references, written warranties, and local permit familiarity—especially work near {{landmark}}.

neighborhood_pride.headline: From {{neighborhood}} to {{parks}}: micro-climates matter
neighborhood_pride.body: Tree cover, western sun, and wind corridors differ block by block. A good {{city}} plan accounts for debris, algae risk, and ventilation—not a one-size quote.

permitting_logic.headline: Permits and codes in {{county}}
permitting_logic.body: Fastening patterns, ice/water barriers, and ventilation rules evolve. Local crews who pull permits in {{city}} reduce rework and resale headaches.
